title: Membership Consultant (amber)
description:
amber, the exciting new sister brand of Amore Fitness, is an upcoming boutique women’s-only group functional training studio in Singapore. The studio is built around high-quality coaching, strong community, and long-term member development. Join us as we take a step towards a new era of fitness in Singapore. 

The Membership Consultant is the first point of contact for prospective and existing members. This role is responsible for delivering a warm, professional, and informative experience that converts enquiries into memberships and builds long-term relationships.

You will play a key role in sales, onboarding, and retention, while contributing to the overall energy and community of the studio. This position suits someone who is people-focused, confident, and enjoys helping others take the first step in their fitness journey.

Key Responsibilities: 

Sales & Member Onboarding

  • Act as the primary point of contact for enquiries via walk-ins, email, phone, and social channels
  • Conduct studio tours and clearly explain the studio’s training concept and membership options
  • Convert trials, intro offers, and enquiries into active memberships
  • Guide new members through onboarding, booking systems, and studio policies
  • Take charge of branch sales and retention performance 

Member Experience & Relationship Building

  • Maintain a welcoming, professional front-of-house presence
  • Build strong relationships with members through regular follow-up and engagement
  • Handle member questions, concerns, and feedback in a calm and solutions-oriented manner
  • Engage with the local community through social gatherings, workshops, and member appreciation events to strengthen relationships
  • Contribute ideas and collect feedback to improve the overall client experience and studio atmosphere

Administrative & Reporting Support

  • Manage studio operations, including scheduling, check-ins and a clean and organized environment 
  • Manage bookings, payments, membership changes, and account enquiries
  • Track leads, follow-ups, and conversions accurately in the studio system
    Support basic sales and membership reporting
  • Assist the Studio Manager with operational and administrative tasks as required

Qualification and Experience:

  • Experience in sales, customer service, hospitality, or boutique fitness preferred
  • Previous experience in a fitness or wellness environment is an advantage
  • Comfortable discussing pricing, packages, and fitness services with confidence
  • Consultative, relationship-based sales experience preferred

Requirements and Skill Set: 

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills
  • Passion for health and wellness 
  • Confident, friendly, and customer-focused
  • Organised, reliable, and detail-oriented
  • Comfortable working evenings, weekends, and flexible shifts
  • Familiarity with booking or CRM systems is a plus

What We Offer: 

  • Competitive salary + benefits package 
  • Free gym memberships 
  • Career progression through studio expansions 
  • Access to professional development, education and certifications 
  • Opportunity to be part of a studio from its early growth phase

We offer a competitive salary and benefits package based on merit and professional advantages of a dynamic environment that supports your development and recognizes your achievements.

Interested candidates are welcome to submit a detailed resume. For more information, please visit us at: www.amorefitness.com.

postedCompany.description:
Empowering Women Through Every Stage of Life

Since 1985, Amore Fitness has been Singapore’s leading women-only fitness and wellness brand — dedicated to helping women embrace healthier, stronger, and more confident lives.

From students and young professionals to mothers and seniors, we create a supportive community where women can thrive through every chapter of life.

Amore Fitness – Full-service gyms & studios with a wide range of group classes, from dance-inspired workouts to strength training, designed exclusively for women.
am Pilates – Dedicated reformer Pilates studios that focus on posture, core strength, and mindful movement.
Amore Define – Boutique spas offering rejuvenating treatments that restore balance and wellness.

With over four decades of experience, we remain passionate about blending fitness, wellness, and lifestyle into one holistic journey. Our mission goes beyond workouts — we aim to build a strong community of women who uplift and inspire one another.

👉 Join us as we redefine women’s wellness in Singapore.
Reach out to us at hr@amorefitness.com if you are keen to find out about our current openings!
postedCompany.name: AMORE FITNESS PTE. LTD.
